'''鈭歯g-y-d''' ('''ngayada''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:veg|veg]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-y-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:veg|veg]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-y-d
|-
! Lemma
| ngayada
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngayadithi|ngayadithi]] || [[word:ngayadiji|ngayadiji]] || [[word:ngayadishi|ngayadishi]] || [[word:ngayadi|ngayadi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngayaduthuth|ngayaduthuth]] || [[word:ngayadujuj|ngayadujuj]] || [[word:ngayadushush|ngayadushush]] || [[word:ngayad|ngayad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngayaduthu|ngayaduthu]] || [[word:ngayaduju|ngayaduju]] || [[word:ngayadushu|ngayadushu]] || [[word:ngayadu|ngayadu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngayadufuth|ngayadufuth]] || [[word:ngayadufuj|ngayadufuj]] || [[word:ngayadufush|ngayadufush]] || [[word:ngayaduf|ngayaduf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngayadethe|ngayadethe]] || [[word:ngayadeje|ngayadeje]] || [[word:ngayadeshe|ngayadeshe]] || [[word:ngayade|ngayade]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngayadothoth|ngayadothoth]] || [[word:ngayadojoj|ngayadojoj]] || [[word:ngayadoshosh|ngayadoshosh]] || [[word:ngayad|ngayad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngayadotho|ngayadotho]] || [[word:ngayadojo|ngayadojo]] || [[word:ngayadosho|ngayadosho]] || [[word:ngayado|ngayado]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngayadofoth|ngayadofoth]] || [[word:ngayadofoj|ngayadofoj]] || [[word:ngayadofosh|ngayadofosh]] || [[word:ngayadof|ngayadof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngayad忙th忙|ngayad忙th忙]] || [[word:ngayad忙j忙|ngayad忙j忙]] || [[word:ngayad忙sh忙|ngayad忙sh忙]] || [[word:ngayad忙|ngayad忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngayadathath|ngayadathath]] || [[word:ngayadajaj|ngayadajaj]] || [[word:ngayadashash|ngayadashash]] || [[word:ngayad|ngayad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngayadatha|ngayadatha]] || [[word:ngayadaja|ngayadaja]] || [[word:ngayadasha|ngayadasha]] || [[word:ngayada|ngayada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngayadafath|ngayadafath]] || [[word:ngayadafaj|ngayadafaj]] || [[word:ngayadafash|ngayadafash]] || [[word:ngayadaf|ngayadaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:ngayadasha|ngayadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gongayadasha|gongayadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokingayadasha|gokingayadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngayadn眉sha|ngayadn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gongayadnkn眉sha|gongayadnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokingayadn眉sha|gokingayadn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngayadsh毛sha|ngayadsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongayadnksh毛sha|gongayadnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingayadsh毛sha|gokingayadsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngayadrosha|ngayadrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongayadnkrosha|gongayadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingayadrosha|gokingayadrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngayadmusha|ngayadmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gongayadnkmusha|gongayadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingayadmusha|gokingayadmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:ngayadsherasha|ngayadsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gongayadnksherasha|gongayadnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokingayadsherasha|gokingayadsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:ngayadngasha|ngayadngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gongayadnkngasha|gongayadnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokingayadngasha|gokingayadngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngayadyasha|ngayadyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gongayadnkyasha|gongayadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokingayadyasha|gokingayadyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:ngayadyamasha|ngayadyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gongayadnkyamasha|gongayadnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokingayadyamasha|gokingayadyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngayadn眉sh毛sha|ngayadn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongayadnkn眉sh毛sha|gongayadnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingayadn眉sh毛sha|gokingayadn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngayadn眉rosha|ngayadn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongayadnkn眉rosha|gongayadnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingayadn眉rosha|gokingayadn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngayadn眉musha|ngayadn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongayadnkn眉musha|gongayadnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingayadn眉musha|gokingayadn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngayadsh毛n眉sha|ngayadsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongayadnksh毛n眉sha|gongayadnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingayadsh毛n眉sha|gokingayadsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngayadsh毛rosha|ngayadsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongayadnksh毛rosha|gongayadnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingayadsh毛rosha|gokingayadsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngayadsh毛musha|ngayadsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongayadnksh毛musha|gongayadnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingayadsh毛musha|gokingayadsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngayadron眉sha|ngayadron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongayadnkron眉sha|gongayadnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingayadron眉sha|gokingayadron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngayadrosh毛sha|ngayadrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongayadnkrosh毛sha|gongayadnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingayadrosh毛sha|gokingayadrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngayadromusha|ngayadromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongayadnkromusha|gongayadnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingayadromusha|gokingayadromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngayadmun眉sha|ngayadmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongayadnkmun眉sha|gongayadnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingayadmun眉sha|gokingayadmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngayadmush毛sha|ngayadmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongayadnkmush毛sha|gongayadnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingayadmush毛sha|gokingayadmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngayadmurosha|ngayadmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongayadnkmurosha|gongayadnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingayadmurosha|gokingayadmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:ngayad|ngayad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ng忙y忙d|ng忙y忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hongayad|hongayad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hong忙y忙d|hong忙y忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohongayad|hohongayad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohong忙y忙d|hohong忙y忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉ngayad|n眉ngayad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉ng忙y忙d|n眉ng忙y忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ngayad|n眉n眉ngayad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ng忙y忙d|n眉n眉ng忙y忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂ngayad|n茂ngayad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂ng忙y忙d|n茂ng忙y忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ngayad|n茂n茂ngayad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ng忙y忙d|n茂n茂ng忙y忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lungayad|lungayad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lung忙y忙d|lung忙y忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulungayad|lulungayad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulung忙y忙d|lulung忙y忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lingayad|lingayad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ling忙y忙d|ling忙y忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilingayad|lilingayad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liling忙y忙d|liling忙y忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kongayad|kongayad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kong忙y忙d|kong忙y忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokongayad|kokongayad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokong忙y忙d|kokong忙y忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kengayad|kengayad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keng忙y忙d|keng忙y忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekengayad|kekengayad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeng忙y忙d|kekeng忙y忙d]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
